title: Kvantify
why:
- Kvantify closed a €7M funding round to accelerate innovation in quantum computing for drug discovery.
- The company launched Qrunch, a technology enabling quantum chemistry workflows on real quantum computers, in November 2025.
- Kvantify focuses on coupling quantum and classical computing to address complex molecular simulations in drug discovery.
- The funding will help expand Kvantify’s market presence, business development, and collaborations with drug discovery organizations.
- Kvantify’s work aims to lower drug development attrition rates, reduce R&D costs, and enable discovery of new medicines through quantum computing.
